reference: Hi. You have not mentioned your age. Your swelling could be due to many reasons, such as rheumatoid arthritis, cardiac problems, localized infection, thyroid problems, or deep vein thrombosis. Of course, furosemide helps, but you should never keep your feet in a dependent position to improve your blood circulation. Please undergo a cardiac evaluation and limb venous Doppler.
text: Hi, you have not mentioned your age. Your swelling could be due to many reasons such as rheumatoid arthritis, cardiac problems, localized infection, thyroid problems, or deep vein thrombosis. Of course, thioridazine helps, but you should never keep your feet in a dependent position to improve your blood circulation. Please undergo cardiac evaluation and limb venous doctor.
